content: I will create an integration script `integrate_app.ps1` in the scratch directory to handle the source code merging process for the `3D FET Explorer` sub-app. This script will safely inject the Three.js library CDN scripts, define the new React component, add navigation sidebar and mobile tab bar entries, and set up conditional view routing.

ArtifactMetadata.Summary: PowerShell script to inject Three.js CDN dependencies and merge the 3D FET Explorer sub-app into index.html as a React tab component.

args.Description: Create integrate_app.ps1 script to merge Three.js 3D FET Explorer into index.html.
args.toolAction: Writing integration script for Three.js sub-app
